content.en:
The lazy beast world has an innate Dao monument, and the gods are excited, and the earth lords are naturally extremely excited.

All of a sudden, a large number of Earth Venerables came to the Lazy Beast World.

At first, they were still afraid of the lazy beasts, but when they learned that the lazy beasts would not manage them, they felt much more relieved and tried to enter the world of the lazy beasts one by one.

Some of the Earth Lords entered the Lazy Beast World with the help of the Divine Generals, while others relied on their strong strength to tear apart the barriers of the Lazy Beast World and forcibly entered the Lazy Beast World.

But all the Earth Venerables who can tear apart the barriers of the Lazy Beast World are the strongest among the Earth Venerables, and all of them are ten-star Earth Venerable level existences, and they are all at an extremely powerful level in the Ten Star Earth Venerables.

With the passage of time, there are more and more Earth Lords in the Lazy Beast World, and the resources of the entire Lazy Beast World have been slowly mined, but most of the Earth Lords still want to comprehend the Innate Dao Monument.

There are not many divine generals, so naturally they will not prohibit the earth venerable from participating in enlightenment.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

Ye Tian and the other gods have been contemplating, no one has left, and when they encounter treasures such as the Innate Dao Monument, they are naturally unwilling to waste time, and they will definitely make up for the defects of the Innate Dao and achieve the true Innate Dao before leaving.

And with the help of the Innate Dao Monument, Ye Tian has been comprehending the Chaos Dao, the origin is getting stronger and stronger, and the realm is slowly improving.

"Soon, once the Chaos Dao reaches the Origin Perfection Realm, there will be a transformation!"

This is a secret that Ye Tian got from the Ox Human Clan, once the Great Dao reaches the Origin Perfection Realm, the Origin will refine the whole body, let the physical body break a limit, and the Origin will turn into a bead, from the Origin Well to the Origin Pearl.

Therefore, this is an opportunity for Ye Tian's strength to soar.

Once he really breaks through, with the strength of his Chaos Dao, he can definitely reach the level of a three-star god general in an instant.

After all, his Chaos Dao was the strongest Dao, and it was the most perfect Chaos Dao, even if other people's Origin was perfect, it was far inferior to his Dao.

In order to be able to break through as soon as possible, Ye Tian consumed a lot of elixirs that could improve his comprehension, and with the help of the Innate Dao Monument, the speed of comprehension was even faster.

Year after year!

Ye Tian didn't know when he would break through, maybe he would break through in the next second, maybe it would take tens of thousands of years.

In short, he is only a trace away from the consummation of his specific origin.

Century!

Millennium!

Three thousand years!

On this day, Ye Tian only felt that a shattering sound sounded in his mind, and a sense of realization was generated.

Suddenly.

His Chaos Avenue turned into an Origin Well anomaly, and the Origin Well continued to shrink again, but the Origin was condensed extremely quickly, and the Chaos Avenue Origin Power contained in it became more and more terrifying.

This scene attracted the attention of other gods and generals, as well as many earth deities.

"The Ten Thousand Laws God is about to break through!"

The Ancient God General muttered.

The origin realm broke through, and the aura that Ye Tian had been hiding and suppressing could no longer be hidden, and it suddenly leaked out.

That terrifying aura made those one-star god generals feel terrified and even suffocated, and even those two-star god generals trembled.

"What, the two-star peak god general!!

They were shocked, not even in disbelief.

There are no two-star peak god generals in the Cangyu universe, and the strongest god general is only in the late stage of two stars, and the eternal universe is so weak, how can a two-star peak god general be born.

Moreover, Ye Tian is breaking through, and may be expected to step into the three-star god general.

"The Ten Thousand Law Gods will be the ones who rebel against the sky, and if you step into the three-star God General, won't you be able to transcend?"

A one-star god will speak.

The other gods will change color one by one, yes, the rebels who have stepped into the three-star god generals can try to transcend.

If it succeeds, then it is a transcendent!

At this moment, many gods were jealous of Ye Tian, but no one dared to show it.

After all, once Ye Tian stepped into the three-star god general, it was enough to sweep them, how could they dare to offend Ye Tian!

The Yuan Gu Divine General and the Stone Dragon Divine General were very happy, the stronger Ye Tian's strength, the better it would be for them, and the other Cangyu Universe Divine Generals would be very jealous and would not dare to attack the Ancient Universe.

After another moment, the Origin Well had slowly deformed, compressing into a chaos-colored bead, which was suspended above Ye Tian's head.

This is his origin pearl and the embodiment of the Great Dao.

Suddenly.

Boom!

Infinite Chaos Dao Origin Power vented out from the Origin Bead and poured into Ye Tian's body, refining his body at an incredible speed.

Taking advantage of this opportunity, Ye Tian hurriedly cultivated the Xuanxuan Technique.

The Xuanxu Jue, which was originally in the third layer of the consummation realm, was loosened at this moment, and after a while, the shackles of the Xuanxu Jue broke through and officially stepped into the fourth layer of the entry realm.

At the same time, Ye Tian's physical body also underwent a transformation.

The strength of the physical body continued to skyrocket, and the aura also skyrocketed wildly.

Click!

The sound of shattering sounded in the darkness, it was a vision of the power of battle breaking the shackles.

At this moment, Ye Tian finally broke the shackles of two-star god generals and three-star god generals, and officially became a three-star god general powerhouse.

Opening his eyes, Ye Tian's gaze seemed to pass through the long river of time, and saw his own soul imprint in the depths of the infinite river of time, that soul imprint was deeply trapped in the long river of time, and the infinite power of time pulled it, so that it could not leave the long river of time at all.

Ye Tian can try to pull his soul imprint at this moment and let it detach itself, once the soul imprint breaks away from the long river of time and returns to the main body, it will be tantamount to detachment.

But once you do this, you must face the last thunder tribulation of the Rebels - the Tribulation of the Transcendent!

Ye Tian had a feeling that he might not be able to survive the catastrophe of the transcendent at present!

Of course, even if he could, he wouldn't go through the tribulation, and he would only become an ordinary detached person, which was not the result he wanted.

"Congratulations to the Ten Thousand Law Divine Generals!"

"Congratulations to the Ten Thousand Law Divine Generals!"

"Congratulations to the Ten Thousand Law Divine Generals!"

One god general after another got up and congratulated Ye Tian, but these gods were basically just talking on the surface, and no one knew what was going on in their hearts.

Ye Tian responded simply, and then continued to comprehend, and the other gods did not want to waste time and also comprehended again.

Perhaps stimulated by Ye Tian, these gods also began to take out some treasures one after another to speed up their comprehension.

It's a pity that they can't even make up for the defects of the Great Dao, and it is almost impossible to reach Ye Tian's level.

"Now, my origin has been fully transformed into the origin pearl, and the next step is to condense a true avenue of my own. Before, it was all the Great Dao of Enlightenment, and that Great Dao was chaotic, not its own. Only by condensing your own avenue can you completely belong to yourself. In the midst of chaos, if the power of the True Spirit Realm Perfection Realm can completely walk out of its own avenue and condense a true avenue, it can step into the realm of the Great Dao, and once the avenue is consummated and completely integrated with itself, it is the realm of the Convergence Dao!"

From the perspective of the realm, it seems that there is only one step between the Origin Perfection and the Condensation Dao, but in fact, there are too many steps behind.

First of all, stepping out of your own avenue, this step has stopped countless strong people, and even some weak True Spirit Realm powerhouses have not taken this step.

Second, it will take a long time to get out of your own avenue, but also to condense the prototype of the avenue, and then slowly breed it.

The third step is to start the Great Dao World, otherwise how to completely exist a Great Dao in one's body, once the Great Dao World is opened, it is equivalent to the origin of the Great Dao World.

Ye Tian had only just reached the Origin Consummation now, and as for how to take the next step, he had no clue at all.

After spending a few years and stabilizing the realm, Ye Tian tried to rely on the innate Dao tablet to comprehend the supernatural powers, and let several of his great supernatural powers enter the Xiaocheng realm, but found that it was too difficult.

Maybe it would take a long time to achieve the goal, but Ye Tian couldn't waste so much time.

In short, this Innate Dao Monument was of little use to him.
